group.name: How should the Fitting Room open? (just settings - change any of it, any time)

plugin.name: Lore-friendly
plugin.description:
Dressing up costs you something. This adds the Seamstone, a carryable Alteration focus sold by Farengar Secret-Fire in Dragonsreach (one small plugin, FittingRoomLore.esp), and the book "On the Outward Art" turns up in your inventory to point you at him. Carry the stone to open the Fitting Room, and pay a little gold for each slot you change when you apply an outfit. Previewing is always free.
This choice ONLY sets your starting settings. Both options install the same mod, and the gold cost and the Seamstone requirement are both switches in the in-game settings panel, so you can change your mind whenever you like. The transmog itself works exactly the same either way.
Source, docs and issue tracker: https://github.com/maartenharms/fitting-room
Thanks for installing, and if you enjoy it, a kind endorsement is always appreciated.

plugin.name: Free-form
plugin.description:
Just the wardrobe. Your hotkey opens the Fitting Room in your inventory, changing an outfit is free, and no plugin is installed at all.
This choice ONLY sets your starting settings. Both options install the same mod, and you can turn the gold cost back on at any time in the in-game settings panel. The Seamstone item itself is the one part that needs a plugin, so if you want it later, run this installer again and pick Lore-friendly.
Source, docs and issue tracker: https://github.com/maartenharms/fitting-room
Thanks for installing, and if you enjoy it, a kind endorsement is always appreciated.
